name: sendCampaignSms
label: Send SMS Campaign
description: Creates and sends an SMS campaign to one or more recipients via SMS en Masse.

parameters.name: recipients
parameters.label: Recipients
parameters.help: Phone numbers in international format, separated by commas. Example: 33645332637,33667656608

parameters.name: message
parameters.label: Message
parameters.help: Max 160 characters per SMS. Longer messages will be split automatically.

parameters.name: name
parameters.label: Campaign Name
parameters.help: Internal name to identify the campaign in your SMS en Masse account.

parameters.name: sender
parameters.label: Sender Name
parameters.help: 3 to 11 characters, must start with a letter. Leave empty to use the default short number.

parameters.name: sendAt
parameters.label: Scheduled Send Date
parameters.help: Leave empty for immediate sending. Format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss (example: 2026-01-15 14:30:00)

parameters.name: country
parameters.label: Country
parameters.help: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Example: FR, BE, CH.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.label: Custom Identifier
parameters.help: Your internal reference to find this campaign in your systems.

parameters.name: webhookUrl
parameters.label: Webhook URL (DLR)
parameters.help: URL to receive delivery status updates for each SMS. Use a Make webhook URL from an "SMS Campaign Status Updated" trigger module.

error.422: Invalid SMS or insufficient credits. Check your message, recipients and balance.
